phase: brownfield improvement — KB retrieval fix + tooling setup
completed_this_session: WorkflowRunner.swift: fixed multi-hop KB retrieval bug — sentinel message injected when retrieve step returns 0 chunks (was silently writing empty string, causing LLM to answer from training data only)
Sentinel: '[No relevant content found in the knowledge base for this query. The knowledge base may be empty, or no documents match the search terms.]'
Log upgraded: '⚠ 0 chunks retrieved — check KB assignment and document indexing. <slot> will signal no-context to the LLM.'
ECC configure-ecc run: 35 core skills + 10 common rules installed to ~/.claude/ (user-level)
prior_session_completed: Updated all .md files with new app name 'Ragion' (replacing 'RAGFlow Mobile' and heading-level 'RAGFlowMobile')
App renamed from RAGFlowMobile / RAGFlow to Ragion across all targets (main app, widget, share extension)
Tagline 'Where retrieval meets reason' added to SplashView and OnboardingView
Compiled full prioritized backlog from CONTRIBUTING.md + FEATURE_COMPARISON.md (High/Medium/Low + feature gaps by category)
Fixed LLM error surfacing: OpenAIService + OllamaService split non-HTTP / non-200 guards with descriptive serverError messages
Fixed KB tap on iPhone (task 12): replaced 3 competing navigationDestination registrations with single KBNavDest wrapper
Fixed stale KB snapshot in retrieveChunks: re-fetches live KB from DB at query time via db.kb(id:)
Added workflow export/import (task 16), 50-doc cap (task 20), New Chat button (task 18), multiline tooltips (task 19)
Registered custom UTTypes for .ragflow-kb and .ragflow-workflow in Info.plist
